tangy-spinach-salad.name: Tangy Spinach Salad
instructions: Whisk onion, sugar, apple cider vinegar, canola oil, yellow mustard, salt, celery seed, and black pepper together in a bowl until well combined. Chill in refrigerator at least 2 hours to blend flavors.
Mix spinach, stuffing mix, eggs, and bacon together in a large bowl. Add dressing and stir to coat.

tater-tot-hotdish.name: Tater Tot Hotdish

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: summer squash, or white button mushrooms (depending on the season), coarsely chopped

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 400°. Melt 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a large skillet or medium Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add 1 lb. ground beef (preferably 20% fat), 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. freshly ground pepper and cook, stirring and breaking up meat into smaller pieces with a wooden spoon or heatproof rubber spatula, until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes; remove pan from heat. Using a slotted spoon, transfer meat to a 13x9" baking dish. Pour off all but 1 Tbsp. fat in pan; discard. (Do not wipe out any of the browned bits.)

Melt 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter in same pan over medium-high heat. Add 1 lb. zucchini, summer squash, or white button mushrooms (depending on the season), coarsely chopped, ½ large onion, coarsely chopped, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. freshly ground pepper and mix to combine, then cook, mostly undisturbed, until vegetables starts to brown, about 5 minutes. Continue to cook, stirring often, until tender, 8–10 minutes more. Transfer to baking dish and stir into meat. Spread into an even layer.

Melt remaining 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter in same pan over medium heat. Add 1 large carrot, peeled, coarsely chopped, 1 large celery stalk, coarsely chopped, 3 garlic cloves, finely chopped, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. freshly ground pepper, and remaining ½ large onion, coarsely chopped. Cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender and browned slightly, 8–10 minutes. Sprinkle ⅓ cup (42 g) all-purpose flour evenly over and cook, stirring constantly, until no pockets of dry flour remain, about 3 minutes.

Stirring constantly, gradually add 2½ cups whole milk, then 1½ cups low-sodium vegetable broth and 1 Tbsp. soy sauce. Cook, stirring often, until sauce thickens, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in ¼ cup finely chopped parsley. Taste sauce and season with more salt and pepper if needed.

Top meat mixture with 2 cups frozen corn, green beans, and/or peas, then pour sauce over. Scatter 4 oz. cheddar, coarsely grated (about 1 cup), evenly over and arrange one 32-oz. bag frozen tater tots in a single layer on top, pressing them in slightly to adhere. (There may be extra depending on how you arrange them.)
Bake hotdish until bubbling and tater tots are browned on top, 45–50 minutes. Season with salt and pepper and let cool 10 minutes. Top with more finely chopped parsley just before serving.

thai-red-curry-soup.name: Thai Red Curry Soup

ingredients.item: Pouch uncle ben's® ready rice® jasmine

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Season shrimp with salt and pepper. Add shrimp to pot and cook 2 to 3 minutes or until pink, turning halfway through. Set aside.
Add remaining olive oil, bell pepper, onion, and garlic to pot. Cook, stirring occasionally, about 3 minutes or until tender. Stir in curry paste and ginger. Cook 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Stir in stock, coconut milk, and rice, scraping any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Bring to a boil over high heat; reduce heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced, about 10 minutes. Stir in fish sauce and brown sugar. Remove from heat.

Using an immersion blender, puree soup in pot. Or carefully transfer soup in batches to a large food processor or blender, covering opening with a dish towel, and blend until pureed. Return soup to pot.
Stir in green onions, cilantro, basil, and lime juice. Divide soup evenly among 6 bowls and top each bowl with 3 shrimp. Serve immediately.

thai-salad-with-peanut-sauce-teleculinar.name: Thai Salad With Peanut Sauce
thai-salad-with-peanut-sauce-teleculinar.original_name: Salada Thai com molho de amendoim

ingredients.item: 1 colher (sopa)  vinagre de arroz ou de vinho branco

instructions: In a large bowl, mix the sliced sleeve, reserving some slices for decoration, chopped corianders, chopped mint leaves, carrot, previously peeled and grated, finely sliced red cabbage, lettuce and red pepper, clean and laminated.
In another bowl, mix all the ingredients for sauce and then crush everything with the help of a magic wand or a crusher. Pour the sauce over the salad and mix well.
Decore com amendoim torrado picado e as fatias de manga que reservou. Sirva de seguida.

thai-shrimp-fried-rice-kao-pad-goong.name: Thai Shrimp Fried Rice (kao Pad Goong)
instructions: Stir together oyster sauce, fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar in a small bowl. Set aside.

Heat 1/2 tablespoon oil in a large cast iron skillet or wok over medium heat. Add shrimp, 1/4 cup green onions, and 1 tablespoon garlic. Cook, stirring constantly, until shrimp are firm and opaque, 3 to 4 minutes. Transfer to a bowl.

Without cleaning the skillet, add another 1/2 tablespoon oil over medium heat. Add remaining 1/4 cup green onions, remaining 1 tablespoon garlic, and mixed vegetables. Cook, stirring often, until vegetables are tender, about 4 minutes. Push to the side of the skillet and add another 1 tablespoon oil to the center. Add beaten egg and let sit for 20 seconds; then stir gently until large curds form, about 1 minute. Stir cooked eggs and vegetables together.

Increase heat to medium-high and add remaining 1 tablespoon oil. Stir in cooked rice and reserved sauce; flatten rice in skillet. Cook, flipping and turning occasionally, until rice is brown and crispy in some spots, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in cooked shrimp.

thai-stir-fried-noodles-pad-see-ew.name: Thai Stir-fried Noodles (pad See Ew)

ingredients.prep: broilers or fryers, thigh, meat only, raw

instructions: {'level': 'Place rice noodles in a large bowl and cover with boiling water.', 'step': 'Soak until tender, 4 to 8 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with water and leave in a colander to drain.'}

{'level': 'Combine oyster sauce, water, dark and regular soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar in a small bowl.', 'step': 'Add noodles and sauce; fold gently to combine, until sauce evenly coats the noodles and caramelizes a bit, and chicken is cooked through, 1 to 2 minutes.'}

{'level': 'Place a wok over high heat; add oil and mince garlic straight into the wok.', 'step': 'Heat until oil is hot and garlic is starting to turn golden, about 1 minute. Add chicken and broccoli; stir-fry for 1 minute.'}
{'level': 'Move chicken and broccoli to one side.', 'step': 'Crack egg into the skillet and scramble it, about 1 minute.'}
{'level': '', 'step': ''}

thin-crust-pizza-with-roasted-mushrooms-.name: Thin-crust Pizza With Roasted Mushrooms And Smoked Bacon

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a nonstick baking sheet with foil.
Place tomatoes and mushrooms on the prepared baking sheet; drizzle with 1 tablespoon balsamic vinegar and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 to 25 minutes, turning halfway through. Remove from the oven and allow to cool to room temperature, about 25 minutes. Leave oven on.

Meanwhile, heat 1 1/2 tablespoons olive oil in a large, nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions, reduce heat to medium, and caramelize until golden brown and soft, turning occasionally, 15 to 20 minutes. Season with salt and pepper and a light drizzle of balsamic vinegar; set aside to cool.
Cook bacon on a paper towel-lined, microwave-safe plate on high heat at 1 to 2 minutes intervals until almost crisp. Coarsely chop.

Brush sides of the pizza crust with a thin layer of olive oil and place on a pizza pan. Spread Alfredo sauce evenly in a thin layer around the crust, leaving about 1/2 inch crust showing around the edge. Sprinkle with Fontina cheese. Spoon tomato-mushroom mixture over top, then caramelized onions. Sprinkle bacon and Gorgonzola crumbles over the vegetables.
Return to the oven and bake until the top is bubbly and starting to turn golden and the edges are golden brown, 15 to 18 minutes.

tie-dye-butter-cookies.name: Tie-dye Butter Cookies

ingredients.item: . vanilla extract or vanilla bean paste
. (or more) any color plant-based food-coloring powder*
. (or more) second color plant-based food-coloring powder*

instructions: Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat butter, sugar, and salt in a large bowl, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl as needed, until light and creamy, about 3 minutes. Add egg yolks and vanilla and beat until incorporated, about 1 minute. Reduce speed to low, add 2 cups flour, and mix until incorporated. Dough will be semifirm but can be rolled out without chilling. If your kitchen is very warm and/or dough is sticky, pat it into a 1"-thick disk, wrap in plastic, and chill 15 minutes to let firm up before rolling out.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Roll out dough on a lightly floured sheet of parchment paper, dusting with more flour as needed to keep dough from sticking, to about ¼" thick. Punch out shapes as desired with lightly floured cookie cutters and transfer to 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 1½" apart. Pat scraps into a 1"-thick disk, wrap with plastic, and chill 10 minutes if soft.

Bake 1 sheet of cookies, rotating halfway through, until edges are golden brown, 10–15 minutes. Let cookies cool 10 minutes on baking sheet, then transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely. Bake remaining sheet of cookies, then repeat process with remaining dough.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 month ahead; wrap tightly and freeze. Cookies can be baked 2 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

Whisk 1 cup powdered sugar, 3 Tbsp. milk, 2 tsp. food-coloring powder, and half of salt in a small bowl until no lumps remain. Glaze should be the consistency of heavy cream; add more milk if needed. For a deeper color, whisk in more powder 1 tsp. at a time until desired color is achieved; adjust with milk if needed. Repeat with second food-coloring powder, remaining salt, remaining 1 cup powdered sugar, and remaining 3 Tbsp. milk, adjusting intensity of color as desired.

Spoon 1 tsp. first glaze in the center of a small plate. Drizzle 1 tsp. second glaze over the first and use a toothpick to slightly swirl colors together; don’t go overboard. (If you want to decorate larger cookies, add 1 tsp. glaze to plate for each additional inch.)

Gently press the top of a cookie into glaze, then lift up and allow excess glaze to drip back onto the plate. Using a toothpick, pop any air bubbles and swirl colors more if desired. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with 2 more cookies, adding ½ tsp. of each color of glaze to plate before each cookie is dipped. The glaze will lose its swirly effect at this point. Clean plate and repeat process, decorating cookies in batches of 3 until all cookies have been glazed. Let sit until glaze is set, at least 2 hours.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be glazed 1 day ahead. Store tightly wrapped on a rimmed baking sheet at room temperature.

*Cooks Note: If you want to use regular liquid food coloring, whisk 1 cup powdered sugar, 2 Tbsp. milk, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl until no lumps remain. Add food coloring drop by drop, stirring to incorporate, then thin glaze if needed with 1 tsp. milk at a time until it reaches the consistency of heavy cream.

tomato-grilled-cheese-soup.name: Tomato Grilled-cheese Soup

ingredients.prep: plus  0.5 cup (1 stick) at room temperature

instructions: Heat 4 Tbsp. butter in a Dutch oven or medium stockpot over medium heat. Add onion and cook, stirring often, until softened and lightly browned around the edges, 8–10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring to coat onion, until tomato paste is slightly darkened in color, about 2 minutes. Add canned tomatoes, vegetable broth, thyme, bay leaf, and sugar and bring to a simmer. Season with salt and pepper and cook until flavors are melded, 35–40 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in cream. Remove thyme stems and bay leaf and let cool slightly. Working in batches, purée in a blender until smooth.

Heat a dry skillet, preferably cast-iron, over medium heat. Dividing evenly, spread room-temperature butter over bread slices. Top unbuttered side of 8 slices with cheddar, dividing evenly. Top with remaining bread, buttered side up, and cook, turning once, until bread is golden brown and cheese is melted, about 3 minutes per side. Cut sandwiches into soldiers and serve alongside hot soup for dipping.

tomato-panzanella-with-creamy-any-pickle.name: Tomato Panzanella With Creamy Any-pickle Dressing

ingredients.prep: such as ciabatta or baguette; 6–10 oz.

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 400°. Toss 6 cups 1" pieces torn crusty bread (such as ciabatta or baguette; 6–10 oz.), ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt on a rimmed baking sheet to coat bread evenly. Bake until edges of bread are golden, 8–10 minutes. Let croutons cool on baking sheet.

Meanwhile, cut cores out of 1½ lb. mixed medium or large tomatoes, preferably heirloom (3–4) and cut into 1½" pieces and/or wedges. Transfer to a large bowl, add 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and gently toss to combine. Let sit at room temperature 20 minutes.
Add 2 tsp. red wine vinegar and remaining 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil to seasoned tomatoes and gently toss to coat. Add croutons and gently toss again. Let panzanella sit 5 minutes.
Add 1 cup (loosely packed) torn basil leaves and ¼ cup (loosely packed) torn dill fronds to panzanella and gently toss to distribute evenly. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Spread 1 cup Creamy Any-Pickle Dressing on a platter and pile panzanella on top. Season with freshly ground pepper and top with more torn basil leaves and torn dill fronds.

tomato-toast-with-peaches-mozzarella-and.name: Tomato Toast With Peaches, Mozzarella, And Mint

ingredients.item: Thick slices brioche or pain de mie

instructions: Spread each toast evenly with butter and layer mozzarella, tomatoes, and peaches on top. Top with mint, drizzle with oil, and season with sea salt.

tostones-with-white-bbq-sauce.name: Tostones With White Bbq Sauce

ingredients.prep: peeled and sliced into 2-in (5 cm) pieces

instructions: For the sauce: Whisk all ingredients together in a bowl, making sure to completely dissolve sugar.
For the tostones: Fill a cast iron skillet or dutch oven with about ¼" of oil and heat on medium high until the temperature reaches 163°C.
Fry the plantains in batches, cut side down, making sure not to crowd the pan, then flip, about 2 ½ minutes per side,
Remove plantains and place on a paper towel to drain. Turn your burner down to keep the oil hot but not burning. Try to maintain the 163°C.
Using the bottom of a glass, gently press down and flatten each plantain piece to ½" thick,
Transfer your mashed plantains back into the fry oil and fry again for 45 seconds per side.
Place your finished plantains on a paper towel to soak up excess oil and immediately sprinkle with kosher salt.
Serve.

traditional-oriental-ajem-pilaf-argiro.name: Traditional Oriental Ajem Pilaf
instructions: Rinse the rice in a colander until the water looks transparent to leave all the starch.
Pour it with the lemon juice and let it drain well.
Heat the oil with the butter and break it into small pieces.
Allow it to rust for a few minutes.
Add the price and sauce for a few minutes until the grease of rice looks clear and clear.
Add the onion and set it aside for 2-3′.
Add the broth, salt and pepper.
Lower the heat, half the pot and simmer for 20′ at the lower intensity.
When little holes appear on the surface it is ready.
Add 1 tablespoon butter, lightly mix and control salt and pepper.
Remove from heat, cover with clean towel and lid.
Let the traditional oriental ajem pilafi stand for 10 minutes.
Serve the ajem on a platter along with the kebabs, a lot of sauce and if you want to garnish with a garnished kefalotiri.

traditional-salad-with-dill-oil-argiro.name: Traditional Salad With Dill Oil

ingredients.item: A few peels of Syrian cheese like michal
A little lemon zest for finishing
1/4 cup of flower oil or simple olive oil
A few peels of Syrian cheese like michal
A little lemon zest for finishing
1/4 cup of flower oil or simple olive oil

instructions: In a pot, boil two eggs for about 4-5 minutes, not to tighten too tight. Allow them to cool and then clean and cut them in half or in four pieces.
Add salt and pepper.
In a bowl, pour the traditional salad inside: lettuce, onion, fresh and dill.
Add the oil artichokes on the salad.
Cut and add peels of Syrian cheese or any other cheese you like.
Add the eggs.
Pour the dressing salad.
To finish, add the lemon zest and a few flower leaves for serving.

tres-leches-cake.name: Tres Leches Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Butter and flour bottom and sides of a glass 13x9" baking dish. Whisk 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, and ¼ tsp. ground cinnamon in a medium bowl to combine.

Beat the whites from 3 large eggs (reserve the yolks) plus 3 large egg whites in a large bowl with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form, 7–8 minutes. Gradually beat in 1½ cups (300 g) sugar. Add 3 large egg yolks one at a time, beating to blend between additions. Beat in 2 tsp. vanilla extract. Add one-third of the flour mixture, followed by ¼ cup whole milk. Repeat with ½ the remaining dry ingredients and the remaining ¼ cup whole milk. Add the rest of the flour mixture and beat just to combine. Pour batter into prepared pan and smooth the top with an offset spatula.
Bake 25 minutes, then reduce heat to 325° and continue baking until cake is golden brown and middle springs back when pressed, 20–25 minutes more. Let cake cool in pan for 15 minutes.

Whisk 1 cup heavy cream, 1 cup evaporated skim milk, 1 cup sweetened condensed milk, 1 Tbsp. dark rum, and ½ tsp. vanilla extract in a medium bowl. Poke holes all over top of cake with a skewer or toothpick. Slowly drizzle half of the milk mixture over cake, letting liquid soak in before adding more. Let cake sit for 10 minutes.

Invert a platter on top of cake. Lift rack and gently invert cake onto platter. Drizzle remaining sauce over. Spoon any liquid collected on sheet over cake.
Do ahead: Tres leches cake can be made 2 days ahead; refrigerate, covered, in baking pan.

Editor’s note: This tres leches cake recipe was first printed in our July 2012 issue. Head this way for more of our favorite cake recipes →

tropical-carrot-turmeric-and-ginger-smoo.name: Tropical Carrot, Turmeric, And Ginger Smoothie
instructions: Using smoothie or ice crush setting, purée orange, carrot, mango, coconut water, hemp seeds, ginger, turmeric, cayenne, salt, and ½ cup ice in a blender until smooth.

tropical-detox-water-anti-inflammatory-r.name: Tropical Detox Water: Anti-inflammatory Recipe In Just A Few Minutes
tropical-detox-water-anti-inflammatory-r.original_name: Agua detox tropical: receta antiinflamatoria en pocos minutos

ingredients.item: 2 cups pineapple fresh cut into cubes
2  rodajas finas de jengibre fresco (aproximadamente 5 gramos en total)
3  hojas de hierbabuena o menta fresca (opcional)
1 pinch of powder turmeric (optional to enhance anti-inflammatory effect)

instructions: Peel and cut pineapple into small cubes. Be sure to use mature pineapple to get more natural sweetness and avoid adding sweeteners.
Lava y pela el jengibre. Luego corta dos rodajas finas para infusionar sin que el sabor resulte demasiado picante.
The pineapple, ginger and peppermint leaves (if you choose to wear them) are put into a large glass pitcher.
Agrega el litro de agua y mezcla bien.
Expand half lemon juice directly into the mixture.
Add ice if you wish to consume it immediately or refrigerate for at least 2 hours to enhance flavors.
Just before you serve, you can add a teaspoon of chia seeds and a pinch of turmeric, stirring to distribute the ingredients well.
Serves in high cups with pineapple and ice cubes. You can decorate with a mint leaf or a slice of lemon.

tuna-paste-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Paste In The Oven
instructions: Heat the oven at 200 degrees. Peel and pinch the onions and garlic. Jump them, in a light, in a frying pan with a little olive oil and a dry chilli for 10 minutes.
Increase the heat and gather the tomato cubes as well as the basil leaves. Let cook for about 20 minutes.
On the other hand, it boils the dough penne in salted water, drains and reserves.
Adicione o atum escorrido ao molho de tomate, tempere com sal e pimenta, junte a massa e envolva tudo.
Dispose of the dough in an oven tray, cover with grated cheese and bring it to the oven until the cheese melts. Serve right away.

turkey-recipe-in-air-fryer-lezzet.name: Turkey Recipe In Air Fryer

ingredients.item: 1 piece of bone-free turkey chest or but (1.5–2 kg)

instructions: 1. Mix olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt and spices in a bowl.
2. rub this sosla every side will be covered.
3. Listen to the native for at 30 minutes, if possible 2–3 hours.
4. Air Fryer set and heating 5 minutes to 180°C.
5. Cook the coconut meat in the chamber 180°C’de 30–35 minutes.
6. Bake again 180 °C’de 30–35 minutes.
7. At the end of cooking interior model at the temperature of 72°C.
8. Shake 10 minutes before service.

turkey-rolls-with-spices-mercadona-telec.name: Turkey Rolls With Spices - Mercadona
turkey-rolls-with-spices-mercadona-telec.original_name: Rolinhos de peru com especiarias - Mercadona

ingredients.item: 50 g  frutos secos tostados e picados

instructions: Num fio de azeite refogue 1 cebola e 1 dente de alho. Junte os cogumelos e 100g de bacon, e tempere com pimenta.
Com um batente para carne, espalme 4 bifes de Peru para que a carne fique fina e tenra.
Over each steak place a portion of the preparation, wrap and close with the help of wire indicated for kitchen.
Frite-os numa frigideira bem quente com um fio de azeite e 1 dentes de alho pi- cado.
Quando os rolos estiverem cozinhados, retire-os da frigideira e prepare o mo- lho.
Deite na frigideira as especiarias e de seguida o leite de coco e o sumo da lima. Retifique os temperos.
Corte os bifes em rodelas e sirva com o molho salpicado com os coentros, a raspa da lima e os frutos secos.

turkey-sausage-and-pepper-skillet.name: Turkey Sausage And Pepper Skillet

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook turkey sausages until they begin to brown and firm up, 3 to 4 minutes per side. Remove to a cutting board and let cool slightly before cutting into 1/2-inch thick diagonal slices; they will not be completely cooked at this point.

Heat remaining 1 tablespoon oil in the same skillet over high heat. Quickly stir-fry onion until it begins to brown, about 1 minute. Add peppers and continue cooking over high heat, stirring constantly, until peppers begin to brown, 2 to 3 minutes. Do not overcrowd the skillet in order to get a nice char on vegetables. Mix in garlic and cook for 1 minute.

Return sausage, and any accumulated juices, to the skillet. Season with crushed red pepper, salt, and pepper and reduce heat to medium. Stir to combine and continue cooking until sausage is no longer pink in the center, about 2 minutes more.

turkey-wrap-with-spinach-lezzet.name: Turkey Wrap With Spinach

ingredients.item: 750 gr fillet turkey chest meat (single piece)

instructions: 1. A little bit of thinned by smashing to be yellowed by the Fileto turkey meat.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in the pan.
3. Add the onion and yellowms you eat.
4. Wash the onion softener and mix the spinach you haven't filled.
5. Spinachs add salt and pepper near light pee.
6. Leave it from January and cool.
7. Depress the water of the whistle mortar, which cools well.
8. Add and mix a whipped egg.
9. Fileto hindi meat broadcast on the countertop.
10. Spread peppers on it.
11. 11. Release Jambon slices.
12. Spanish harper also broadcast.
12. August Spread the grated cheese.
14 July Close coil edges in roll shape with curing or connect with oven rope.
15. Heat the half tablespoon of butter in the pan.
16. Take the coconut wrap into the pan and fry both sides.
17. September Transfer the coconut wrap into the oven container and the remaining butter on it and close with aluminum foil.
18. Bake 30-35 minutes in the oven preheated 180 degrees.
19. September Remove aluminum foil on it and cook for 10 minutes.
20. Listen to the oven for 5 minutes.
21. Serve by slitting.
